cells.rationale: Cross-harness identity association and ambiguity preservation form a subtle correctness invariant across several architectural seams.
Concurrent incremental ingestion, atomic publication, torn-tail handling, and private-file permissions create intertwined correctness and security invariants.
Evidence grading must preserve subtle provenance and confidence invariants while combining FTS ranking, path semantics, and partial failures.
This is substantial but well-specified multi-file CLI integration with explicit contracts, fixtures, and established routing patterns.
Migrating many readers through one resolver without widening capability boundaries is a cross-cutting architectural cascade with ambiguity invariants.
Wrong-session prevention, shell safety, liveness checks, and exact foreground process semantics make this security- and correctness-critical.
The edit is bounded, but concise agent-facing guidance and truthful capability wording benefit from judgment and prose taste.
The atomic repository-wide cutover combines broad mechanical migration with delicate documentation, guidance, and in-repo idiom matching.
